name: shopify-ledsc4-theme
description: LedsC4 B2B Outlet — Shopify theme + import pipeline + Supabase backoffice infra. The 'main' artifact is the Liquid theme + edge functions; this package.json exists only to declare optional Node dependencies for the importer (scripts/import-write.mjs) when run with --with-db (fingerprint upsert into private.sku_state). Default CLI runs without DB do NOT need any deps. NB: we use `pg` (not `postgres@3.x`) — the latter has a SCRAM-SHA-256 bug against Supabase Session pooler (auth fails with 28P01 even though pg with the same URL works fine).

scripts.test: node scripts/import-parse.test.mjs && node scripts/import-map.test.mjs && node scripts/import-write.test.mjs && node scripts/rate-limiter.test.mjs && node scripts/fingerprint.test.mjs && node scripts/lib/image-upload.test.mjs
